mapper.insert:
SELECT [dbo].FN_FS_GETSEQUENCE('TB_FS_BILL_NO', #{sys_id}, '')
INSERT INTO [dbo].TB_FS_BILL ( SYS_ID , FS_BILL_NO , FS_BILL_SEQ , FS_BILL_NM , BILL_CST_ID , BILL_REQ_CD , BILL_REQ_DATE , TAX_BILL_MAKE_DATE , TAX_BILL_CNT , TAX_BILL_ID , TAX_EMAIL , TAX_BILL_DATE , TAX_BILL_TP_CD , TAX_BILL_NO , SUPPLY_AMT , VAT_AMT , BILL_AR_CD , STATUS , RGSTR_ID , RGSTR_DT , MDFR_ID , MDFR_DT , SSMM , BILL_REP_DATE) VALUES ( #{sys_id} , #{fs_bill_no} , [dbo].FN_FS_GETSEQUENCE('TB_FS_BILL_SEQ', #{sys_id}, #{fs_bill_no}) , CONCAT( YEAR(GETDATE()), '년' , FORMAT(MONTH(GETDATE()), '00'), '월_' , FORMAT(DAY(GETDATE()), '00'), '_' , [dbo].FN_FS_GETSNAME2('3', #{sys_id}, #{bill_cst_id}), '_서비스견적서') , #{bill_cst_id} , #{bill_req_cd} , NULL , GETDATE() , #{tax_bill_cnt} , #{tax_bill_id} , #{tax_email} , NULL , #{tax_bill_tp_cd} , NULL , #{supply_amt} , #{vat_amt} , #{bill_ar_cd} , 'Y' , #{rgstr_id} , GETDATE() , #{mdfr_id} , GETDATE() , #{ssmm} , NULL)
